compiled_state.title: Update project docs to reflect shared artifact impact analysis in scrutiny pipeline
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Description

**What**: Update existing project documentation to reflect the addition of Part C (shared artifact impact analysis) and the consumer_completeness dimension to the scrutiny pipeline.

**Why**: Future agents need accurate awareness of the new consumer discovery mechanism in the scrutiny pipeline — its trigger conditions, output format, and blocking behavior.

**Scope**:
- IN: Updating CLAUDE.md architecture section to mention Part C and consumer_completeness; updating any existing documentation that describes the scrutiny pipeline steps or fidelity review dimensions
- OUT: Creating new documentation files; modifying skill files or agent definitions

## Done Definitions

- When this story is complete, CLAUDE.md and existing scrutiny pipeline documentation accurately describe Part C (shared artifact impact analysis) and the consumer_completeness fidelity dimension
  <- Satisfies: documentation completeness for the epic
